procurement_engineering.name: Demonstrate the ability to understand and use commercial management and administration skills.

activities.desc: Preparation of internal reports. E Management, selection and control of sub-contracts and finances, including disputes settlement. Representation of the financial and contractual interests of your employer/client in progress meetings or the like.

The principles of insurance, including professional indemnity and the handling of insurance claims. Analysis of rates and prices, agreement of variations and or compensation events. E Co-ordination of buying, accounts, production control/planning. Supply chain management and procurement techniques, estimating and surveying functions. A working knowledge of labour costs, employment legislation and working rule agreements.
